mode_checkbox_tooltip: Switch mode between using the webcam or a file as input.
physheight_input_tooltip: Physical height between the centers of your markers.
physwidth_input_tooltip: Physical width between the centers of your markers.
digwidth_input_tooltip: Resolution of cropped image between markers.
kernelsize_input_tooltip: The kernel size dictates the size of a matrix used to denoise before running edge detection.
lower_input_tooltip: Lower color value used to filter out the background before running edge detection.
upper_input_tooltip: Upper color value used to filter out the background before running edge detection.
bound_checkbox_tooltip: Display the area between markers that will be cropped too.
contours_checkbox_tooltip: Display leaf edges that have been detected.
convex_checkbox_tooltip: Use a convex hull to automatically account for edge damage of leaves.
